The Proposal: -

The Urban Land (Maximum Retention and Regulation) Act, 1976, is an Act of the Parliament of India, enacted by the Government of India, to provide for the acquisition and management of urban land under the administrative control of the Urban Development Department. From 17.02.1976 onwards, it was applicable in nine civil groups. The state legislature enacted the Civil Land (Ceiling on Retention and Regulation) Repeal Act, 1999. As accepted from 29.11.2007, after reviewing the posts under that establishment, 97 temporary posts in 9 civic groups have been notified under reference No.

37 here, d. By Government Decision dated 15.09.2025. 01.09.2025 that is. 28.02.2026 An extension has been granted for this period. At present, there are 225 posts in the office of 9 Urban Group B Commissioner, Konkan Division in the state. Out of these 225 posts, 97 are temporary in nature.

2. Under the purview of the Urban Development Department. 21.07.2016 and d. As per the government decision dated 31.08.2016, the issue of civil land ceiling retention in urban agglomerations of Thane, Nashik, Nagpur, Ulhasnagar, Solapur, Kolhapur, Sangli and Mumbai and Pune respectively has been handed over to the concerned District Collectors along with office staff. Further, the District Collector concerned has been declared as the "Competent Authority" of the civic body for enforcement of the Prevention of Corruption Act, 1999.

03. As on date, 97 temporary posts in various cadres in 9 civic body offices in the state (Brihanmumbai, Thane, Ulhasnagar-HQ Thane, Pune, Kolhapur, Sangli, Solapur, Nashik and Nagpur) have been sanctioned. 01.03.2026 that is. An extension to this period was under the consideration of the government. Orders in this regard are as follows: -
The Government's Decisions:

Reviewing the day-to-day functioning of 9 civic body offices in the state (Brihanmumbai, Thane, Ulhasnagar-headquartered Thane, Pune, Kolhapur, Sangli, Solapur, Nashik and Nagpur), the government decided to de-notify 97 temporary posts in various cadres mentioned in "Annexure-A" with this decision. 01.03.2026 that is. 31.08.2026 An extension is being approved for this period.
Page 2 of 4
Government Decision No: Nazak-2023 / P.No.60 / Nazakadha,

The expenditure on this matter shall be reported under the head "2053-District Administration (094) Other Establishments Employees for Civil Land (Ceiling on Retention) Regulations, 1976 (2053 1071)" and shall be met from the grant sanctioned for this financial year.

03. The aforesaid orders were issued by the Department of Finance, Government Decision No.1004 / Q.12 (Part II) / 2004 / Financial Reforms-I, D. 04.10.2004 Department of Finance, Government Decision No. Designation-2016 / Q. 8/16 APC, D. are being issued in accordance with the powers conferred on the administrative department under 28.02.2026.
The Government decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
